title: Master Isaac Sim for the Intrinsic AI for Industry Challenge | Robotics Office Hours
description:
Join NVIDIA for Robotics Office Hours, a weekly livestream designed to help developers, researchers, and enthusiasts accelerate their robotics journey. Each session highlights Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab, powerful frameworks for robotics simulation, training, and reinforcement learning built on NVIDIA Omniverse.

This week, we introduce the Intrinsic AI for Industry Developer Challenge, focused on dex

title: Building AI Factories With Digital Twins | OpenUSD Insider
description:
AI factories are scaling at unprecedented speed, but designing and deploying them efficiently remains a major challenge. In this session, NVIDIA and Jacobs will showcase how digital twins powered by NVIDIA Omniverse DSX help teams design, simulate, optimize, and validate AI infrastructure before construction begins. 

Learn how virtual facilities can accelerate deployment timelines, improve energy

title: How to Train AI Robots with Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab | Robotics Office Hours
description:
Join NVIDIA for Robotics Office Hours, the weekly livestream for developers building AI-powered robots. In this session, NVIDIA experts share an end-to-end robot learning workflow using Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, NVIDIA Cosmos, and NVIDIA Omniverse to train manipulation policies and achieve sim-to-real transfer.

Learn why end-to-end learning is gaining momentum, how it compares to traditional robotics

title: Day One Keynote Adobe Summit 2026 With Jensen Huang
description:
The future of industries is built on precision—high‑fidelity digital twins that enable true‑to‑life designs. 👏

At #AdobeSummit 2026, NVIDIA and Adobe showed how Omniverse libraries fuel Firefly and scale creative opportunity from design to manufacturing.

Watch the keynote to see the bridge between design and physical reality in action 🎥 https://nvda.ws/4ct7nvv

title: How AI is Transforming Manufacturing End-to-End
description:
Physical AI is transforming manufacturing, from design to the factory floor. 🦾

Hear how leaders from @ABB, @JLR, and @TulipInterfaces are using AI-powered simulation, synthetic data, and real-time video analytics to unlock new levels of efficiency across the entire product lifecycle.

Watch the full video: https://nvda.ws/3Ocjx2A

title: Take a Walk With Mike Geyer
description:
Walk the #NVIDIAGTC show floor with Mike Geyer and see how industrial AI & digital twins are transforming manufacturing. 👏

Catch him tomorrow at Hannover Messe as he breaks down how Siemens Digital Twin Composer, built on NVIDIA Omniverse, brings simulation-ready digital twins to life.

👉https://nvda.ws/4vCDm3E

title: Build Physical AI into Your App in Less Than 30 Minutes With Omniverse Libraries
description: You already have an application, data model, and CI/CD pipeline. This livestream shows how to bolt on physical AI using NVIDIA Omniverse libraries—ovrtx, ovphysx, and ovstorage—instead of replatforming. In under an hour, Ashley Goldstein will live-code a small, realistic integration: loading a USD scene, stepping a deterministic physics loop, rendering RTX sensor outputs, and wiring everything int

title: Franka Research 3 in Action
description:
What has Franka Robotics been up to? 

We caught up with Marian Körber to explore the latest capabilities of their Franka Research 3 robotic arm and how they are using the NVIDIA robotics stack to power robot training. 🦾 #NVIDIAGTC

title: Robot Party at NVIDIA GTC
description:
Who says robots can’t party? 🎉

These amazing robots from ABB Robotics, Richtech Robots, Sentigent Technology, and Disney Research, Walt Disney Imagineering showed off their fun side at #NVIDIAGTC last month.

title: Sybil: An AI model that can predict lung cancer risk 6 years in advance
description:
Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide. While smoking is the leading cause of lung cancer, lung cancer rates among nonsmokers are on the rise.

Every person has the right to know their risk of developing cancer — Sybil is a deep learning model that accurately predicts a patient’s risk of lung cancer up to six years in advance from analyzing a low-dose CT scan, ensuring

title: The Context Course: a FREE course on building agents with agents #learning #ai #agents
description:
Introducing the context course: a free course on doing ML with agent context.

Sign up: https://hf-learn.short.gy/join-context-course

You will learn how to train models, optimize inferences, and build datasets, all by defining harness context with`SKILLS.md`, Plugins, MCP, Subagents, and Hooks.

The course includes:

- Weekly live AMA 
- Practical projects for ML with context
- Instructions in Pi

title: The Context Course Live Stream #1: Units 0+1 AMA
description:

In this stream we'll walk through Units 0 and 1, answer your questions live, and show how agent skills work in practice.

title: How To Win Humanity's Last Hackathon - The hardest agent contest in AI.
description:
Follow this org to sign up: https://hf-learn.short.gy/nvB8JD

The hardest agent contest in AI just launched. Here's how to win it.
You can now sign up to Humanity's Last Hackathon. You build Mac Metal kernels. You use Codex from OpenAI to optimize them. You submit through Hugging Face. The fastest kernels qualify for the final battle.

title: Multi-Agent AutoResearch with Open Source Models
description:

title: RL for Agents Workshop - Deep Dive on Training Agents with RL and Open Source
description:
Reinforcement learning is becoming central to agentic systems, but moving from RL for LLMs to RL for agents introduces a new set of challenges: environments, rollouts, tool use, inference bottlenecks, reward design, and evaluating multi-step behavior in the real world.

In this live Hugging Face workshop, we bring together researchers and builders working on the frontier of RL for agents. The sess

title: Hugging Face Journal Club: Embarrassingly Simple Self-Distillation Improves Code Generation
description:
The Hugging Face research team discusses Apple's Embarrassingly Simple Self-Distillation Improves Code Generation paper.

Paper: https://huggingface.co/papers/2604.01193

title: RoPE: Understanding Rotary Positional Embeddings in transformers
description:
Mastering Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE): From Zero to Deep Dive

Unlock the secrets behind modern Large Language Model (LLM) architectures in this comprehensive breakdown of Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE). Sparked by the introduction of "pruned RoPE" in Gemma 4, this video provides a complete "brain dump" on how models maintain token order and spatial context.

Chapter Timestamp:
00:00

title: What are Mixture-of-Experts Models | ft. Aritra
description:
In this clip, Aritra Roy Gosthipaty from the Hugging Face Transformers team breaks down one of the most important (and often misunderstood) architectures in modern AI: Mixture-of-Experts models.

Main MOE explainer: what they are, why they became mainstream, and why the ecosystem shifted around them.

Chapters:
- 00:00 Why Mixture-of-Experts Models Matter
- 00:14 Mixture-of-Experts Layers
- 01:07

title: Are We Overusing Giant Vision Models?
Intro to Mixture of Experts | Aritra Roy Gosthipaty | HF Podcast #2
description:
In this episode, Alejandro sits down with Aritra Roy Gosthipaty from the Hugging Face Transformers team to talk about mixture-of-experts models, why dense models still matter, how synthetic data changes training, and what coding agents are changing for working engineers.

They discuss Mixtral, DeepSeek-V2, Switch Transformers, vLLM, Inference Providers, TinyAya, data curation, local inference limi
